overall.description: A nighttime drive through the futuristic Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, traveling along elevated highways past dense neon signage, holographic advertisements, and towering corporate structures. The journey transitions from enclosed corridors through vibrant commercial districts to open industrial vistas with smokestacks.

agents.ego_description: driving along elevated highway emerging from covered section

large red LED sign displaying HYDRO
digital billboard with purple winged design and CRUSH text

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered elevated walkway with concrete walls and metal railings. As the vehicle emerges from the enclosed corridor around the 5-second mark, the HYDRO LED sign becomes visible on the right, and the CRUSH billboard appears on the left, marking the transition to an open highway environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with panoramic city views

events.description: passing alongside large digital billboard array on highway

agents.ego_description: cruising along elevated highway past illuminated advertisements and holograms

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along an open elevated highway with full sky visibility. A prominent pink circular hologram floats on the right side, while the distant skyline features numerous illuminated towers. The highway is lined with digital billboards, and the CRUSH billboard recedes into the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: tight urban canyon with massive corporate signage

events.description: entering narrow corridor between high-rise buildings dominated by large cyan corporate logo

massive illuminated cyan A-shaped corporate logo structure

segments.scene_description: The highway enters a narrow urban canyon between towering buildings, blocking most of the sky. A massive cyan Arasaka corporate logo dominates the left side of the frame. The vehicle passes concrete ventilation structures and parking garages while the previous billboards fade into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit entertainment district with dense advertising

agents.ego_description: driving through vibrant neon entertainment district with colorful holographic ads

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen displaying animated character with red and blue colors
billboard with MOONCHIES text and moon imagery
large red neon sign shaped like lips
teal illuminated sign reading BELOW DECK
tall cylindrical tower wrapped with multiple digital screens

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dense entertainment district saturated with neon signage. Prominent advertisements include the MOONCHIES billboard, a large red lips neon sign, and the BELOW DECK establishment. A tall circular media tower rises in the distance, covered in digital screens, while the Arasaka logo disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district with smokestacks and distant fires

events.description: emerging from dense neon district into open industrial area with visible smokestacks and atmospheric haze

agents.ego_description: driving along elevated highway overlooking industrial sector with distant smoke and fires

multi-level highway interchange with teal lighting
orange glow from industrial fires on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The highway opens into a wide industrial vista with full sky visibility. Tall smokestacks dominate the center horizon, emitting smoke into the night air. The highway interchange below is illuminated with teal lights, while an orange glow from distant industrial fires lights up the left horizon. The dense neon signs of the entertainment district fade behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a confined concrete corridor through a neon-saturated urban core and into a sprawling industrial wasteland. It begins within a covered elevated walkway, emerging from the enclosed walls to reveal a wide highway flanked by the HYDRO LED sign and a CRUSH billboard. As the camera moves forward under an open sky, it passes a floating pink circular hologram and a distant skyline of illuminated towers before the environment tightens into a narrow urban canyon dominated by a massive cyan Arasaka logo. The scene then shifts into a dense entertainment district saturated with neon advertisements like MOONCHIES and a large red lips sign, with a towering media screen rising in the distance. Finally, the highway opens once more into a wide industrial vista where the neon glow fades, replaced by towering smokestacks and an orange horizon lit by distant fires.
